custom_sessions.name: Release
custom_sessions.description: Run release script to bump version and tag
custom_sessions.command: CURRENT=$(sed -n 's/^version = "\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p' Cargo.toml | head -1) && echo "Current version: $CURRENT" && read -p "Release version (major|minor|patch|<ver>): " version && bash scripts/release.sh "$version"
